hero.title: Association of rehabilitation Centers - Onaltu
hero.description: Development of medical rehabilitation and rehabilitation treatment through standardization, scientific cooperation and international partnership.

aboutSection.title: About the Association
aboutSection.lead: The Association of legal entities "National Association of Rehabilitation Centers "ONALTU" is an association of organizations engaged in medical rehabilitation and rehabilitation treatment in the Republic of Kazakhstan.
aboutSection.body: We promote the development of the rehabilitation industry, improve the quality of services and implement international standards through cooperation, training and scientific research.

mission.missionText: Promoting the development of medical rehabilitation and rehabilitation treatment in the Republic of Kazakhstan by combining the efforts of rehabilitation centers, implementing international quality standards and training highly qualified specialists.
mission.goalsText: Improving the quality of rehabilitation services, developing scientific potential and forming a unified professional community in the field of medical rehabilitation.

membership.subtitle: By joining the association, you gain access to unique opportunities to develop your center

benefits.title: Professional Community
benefits.description: Access to a network of rehabilitation professionals across Kazakhstan

benefits.title: Training and Professional Development
benefits.description: Participation in seminars, trainings and conferences with leading specialists

benefits.title: Methodological Support
benefits.description: Access to methodological materials, protocols and rehabilitation standards

benefits.title: Standardization and Certification
benefits.description: Assistance in implementing international quality standards for rehabilitation services

benefits.title: International Cooperation
benefits.description: Participation in international projects and exchange of experience with foreign colleagues

benefits.title: Advocacy
benefits.description: Protecting and promoting the interests of rehabilitation centers at the state level

items.question: How to join the association?
items.answer: To join, you need to submit an application, provide the organization's founding documents and sign a contract. Detailed information is on the "Membership" page.

items.question: How much does membership cost?
items.answer: The amount of membership fees depends on the type of organization. Detailed information can be obtained by contacting us by phone or email.

items.question: What are the obligations of association members?
items.answer: Association members are obliged to comply with the charter, participate in events and contribute to achieving the goals of the association.

footer.copyright: ©2026 Association of legal entities "National Association of Rehabilitation Centers "ONALTU"

aboutPage.intro: The Association of legal entities "National Association of Rehabilitation Centers "ONALTU" was created to unite the efforts of organizations working in the field of medical rehabilitation and rehabilitation treatment in the Republic of Kazakhstan.
aboutPage.historyText1: The association was founded in 2019 on the initiative of a group of leaders of leading rehabilitation centers in Kazakhstan. The need for unification was driven by the need to coordinate efforts, exchange experience and jointly solve industry problems.
aboutPage.historyText2: During its work, the association has united more than 50 organizations from different regions of the country, held dozens of educational events and established cooperation with international partners.

governance.title: General Meeting of Members
governance.subtitle: Supreme governing body
governance.text: Determines the strategic directions of the association's development, approves the charter and elects governing bodies.

governance.title: Board of the Association
governance.subtitle: Executive body
governance.text: Carries out the current management of the association's activities, implements the decisions of the general meeting.

governance.title: Audit Commission
governance.subtitle: Supervisory body
governance.text: Exercises control over the financial and economic activities of the association.

aboutPage.representationNote: Each member of the Association has the right to one representative with one vote in the General Assembly.

directions.title: Standardization of Rehabilitation Services
directions.description: Development and implementation of unified quality standards for rehabilitation services.

directions.title: Scientific Research
directions.description: Promoting scientific research in the field of medical rehabilitation.

directions.title: Personnel Training
directions.description: Organizing professional development programs for rehabilitation industry specialists.

directions.title: International Cooperation
directions.description: Developing partnerships with international organizations and exchanging experience.

directions.title: Advocacy
directions.description: Representing the interests of rehabilitation centers in government bodies.

directions.title: Information Support
directions.description: Creating a unified information space for sharing knowledge and experience.

directions.title: Telerehabilitation Development
directions.description: Implementation of remote rehabilitation and patient monitoring technologies.

directions.title: Evidence-based Rehabilitation
directions.description: Promoting approaches based on scientific evidence of effectiveness.

directions.title: Children's Rehabilitation
directions.description: Development of specialized rehabilitation programs for children with special needs.

directions.title: Social Rehabilitation
directions.description: Integration of medical and social rehabilitation for comprehensive recovery.

directions.title: Infrastructure Development
directions.description: Promoting the modernization of the material and technical base of rehabilitation centers.

aboutPage.visionText: We strive to create a developed and accessible medical rehabilitation system in Kazakhstan, where every person receives quality rehabilitation care.
visionPoints: Accessible rehabilitation for all citizens of Kazakhstan
International quality standards in all centers
A unified professional community of specialists
